description: The Sales Director wants to standardize the follow-up process for new leads. Create a new Activity Plan named "Standard Outreach" with two activities: an "Email" with the summary "Intro Packet" scheduled for 0 days after the plan date, and a "Call" with the summary "Follow-up Call" scheduled for 2 days after the plan date. Apply this plan to the opportunity "Acme Corp Inquiry" in the pipeline, scheduling it to start today.
